definitions.name: Hello, 21
definitions.description: First record + sealed interface in P2.
definitions.criteria: grep -rE 'sealed (interface|class)' projects/p2-loan-core-modern/src/main/java has >=1 match AND day-06 verification all_passed

definitions.name: Sealed Fate
definitions.description: Model a domain union with a non-trivial sealed hierarchy (>=3 permits).
definitions.criteria: any sealed interface or class in projects/p[2-9]-*/src/main/java has >=3 permitted types

definitions.name: Pattern Master
definitions.description: Replace 5+ instanceof chains with pattern switches.
definitions.criteria: grep -rE 'switch \(.+\) \{' projects/p[2-9]-*/src/main/java with case-of pattern arms >=5 across project

definitions.name: Hex Vex
definitions.description: Pass ArchUnit hexagonal-boundary test in P3.

definitions.name: Bounded
definitions.description: Aggregate root with enforced invariants AND property tests covering them.
definitions.criteria: p3 has class implementing AggregateRoot AND jqwik @Property tests covering its invariants

definitions.name: Outbox Hero
definitions.description: Transactional outbox loses no message under chaos test.
definitions.criteria: p5 has an outbox table migration AND a passing chaos test that survives a forced rollback

definitions.name: Idempotent Mind
definitions.description: Payment retry test passes 100x without duplication.
definitions.criteria: p6 has a 100-iteration retry test that asserts exactly-once application of a Payment

definitions.name: Contract Killer
definitions.criteria: mvn -pl projects/p6-payments-service test passes contract verifier tests

definitions.name: Loom Lord
definitions.description: Measurable throughput win from virtual threads, charted.
definitions.criteria: p8 contains a benchmark report showing >2x throughput on virtual vs platform threads

definitions.name: Container Diet
definitions.criteria: jib-produced image for any p7+ service is <120MB

definitions.name: kubectl Karma
definitions.description: Full stack green on kind from a cold cluster.
definitions.criteria: kind cluster created then helm install completes AND kubectl get pods shows all Ready

definitions.name: Terraform Tamer
definitions.description: terraform plan is clean on the second run (no churn).
definitions.criteria: two consecutive terraform plans show 0 changes in envs/dev

definitions.name: LocalStack Whisperer
definitions.description: Full integration suite green against LocalStack.
definitions.criteria: p9 integration tests pass against envs/localstack

definitions.name: Chaos Survivor
definitions.criteria: day-30 verification all_passed AND no payment lost in chaos run

definitions.name: The Quarkus Question
definitions.description: Complete 3+ Quarkus side quests and write a comparison ADR.
definitions.criteria: >=3 of SQ-01..SQ-04 marked done AND curriculum/adr/ contains a quarkus comparison ADR
